system.data_sync_desc: Manually force upload your current progress.
system.emergency_load_desc: Force pull cloud save to fix local errors.
system.dev_mode_desc: Remote DB overview & local cache clear.
system.language_desc: Select the display language for interface and logs.

slave_panel.title: [Caravan Roster Overview]
slave_panel.empty_roster: No members under your command currently.
slave_panel.select_prompt: [Select a member to view detailed attributes]

quest_panel.title: [Chronicles of Empire]
quest_panel.empty: [The Abyss remains silent, continue your exploration]
quest_panel.hint: Prestige can be acquired by achieving victories in the underground arena or dispatching tasks at the Abyss Tavern. Once the progress is fulfilled, the system will automatically unlock the next chapter when the time phase advances.

breeding.title: Bloodline Chamber
breeding.desc: A secluded underground facility for forbidden genetic fusions prohibited by the Empire.
breeding.warning: Injecting incompatible genetic sequences will cause the array to fail. Offspring inherit the average attributes of both parents, along with unpredictable abyssal mutations.
breeding.loading: [Processing] Bloodline fusion array activated, weaving new life...
breeding.success: [System] Bloodline fusion successful! Subject Code has been successfully generated and cataloged.
breeding.err_full: [Warning] Insufficient space. Target capacity reached, cannot accommodate new subjects.
breeding.err_missing: [Error] Two test subjects must be provided.
breeding.err_not_idle: [Error] Subjects must be Idle to undergo fusion.
breeding.err_gender: [Repulsion] Lacking sufficient heterosexual reproductive conditions, fusion failed.

passive.human: [Desperate Will] Triggers when HP drops below 40%, boosting Combat by 25%.
passive.elf: [Wind Grace] Increases Speed by 20%; if striking first, initial damage increases by 15%.
passive.orc: [Frenzied Blood] Combat increased by 15%, Endurance decreased by 10%. Recurrent hits stack damage up to 30%.
passive.dwarf: [Solid Physique] Max HP increased by 20%, Endurance increased by 15%. Reduces flat 5 damage per hit.
passive.dragon: [Dragon Pressure] Combat, Endurance, and Speed increased by 10%. Grants flat 20% final damage reduction.
passive.undead: [Immortal Bones] Each successful attack absorbs 15% of damage dealt and converts it into self-stamina.

interaction.d1: The gaze of the Abyss has never shifted, Master.
interaction.d2: I will grind the bones of those enemies into powder.
interaction.d3: The aura here... suffocating yet addictive.
interaction.d4: As long as you command, I am ready to die at any moment.
interaction.d5: Survival or destruction is but a gift of your words.
interaction.task_train_desc: Consume gold to permanently break through skill levels
interaction.task_inventory_desc: Bestow potions for recovery or alter weaponry
interaction.clean_err_stamina: [Warning] Member lacks sufficient stamina for labor.
interaction.clean_faint: [Critical Warning] Collapsed and fainted due to exhaustion after cleanup!
interaction.train_info1: [Warning] Each training costs Gold: 500, Stamina: 40, Stress: +10.
interaction.time_skip_warn2: Consumes 1 global Action Point and advances 1 shift.
interaction.train_err_gold: [Warning] Intensive training requires vast resources; funds insufficient.
interaction.train_err_stamina: [Warning] Subject exhausted, cannot endure brutal training.
interaction.train_err_max: [Notice] This skill has reached mortal limits.
interaction.train_faint: [Critical Warning] Brutal training completely exhausted the subject, resulting in immediate coma!
interaction.unequip_msg: [System] Confiscated armament. Stripping trust dropped Obedience by 10 points.
interaction.gift_weapon: [System] Successfully armed weapon. Gained +10 Obedience bonus.
interaction.warn_desc: As time progresses, stronghold dirtiness and dispatch mission remaining shifts will update. Execute?

housekeeping.title: Stewardship Management
housekeeping.desc: Assign members to clean the stronghold, maintaining neatness to secure recovery efficiency.
housekeeping.err_no_worker: [Error] Please select a cleaning supervisor first.
housekeeping.success: [System] Completed stronghold cleaning and advanced shift.
housekeeping.err_no_idle: No available workforce currently (Leader and members are exhausted or busy).

map.title: Caravan Relocation
map.hint: Advanced strongholds require not only gold but also sufficient [Prestige] to secure entry permits.
map.err_current: [Notice] Your caravan is already stationed here.
map.err_prestige: [Denied] Caravan rank mismatch. Entering requires at least prestige.
map.success: [System] Relocation treaty effective. Stronghold moved successfully.

loc_frontlines.name: Chaotic Frontlines
loc_frontlines.desc: The chaotic edge where empires and the abyss collide. High danger, high filth accumulation, but low rent.
loc_frontlines.perks:
Base Member Capacity: 5
Daily Base Maintenance Rent: $500
Environmental Filth Multiplier: 2.0x

loc_neutral_hub.name: Neutral Trade City
loc_neutral_hub.desc: A grey trade paradise ruled by underground chambers. Expands member slots, unlocks advanced black markets.
loc_neutral_hub.perks:
Base Member Capacity: 10
Daily Base Maintenance Rent: $3,000
Environmental Filth Multiplier: 1.5x
Unlocks Trade events from underground brokers

loc_capital.name: Imperial Capital
loc_capital.desc: The apex of prosperity. High safety, lowest filth accumulation, but weekly land taxes are extremely harsh.
loc_capital.perks:
Base Member Capacity: 20
Daily Base Maintenance Rent: $10,000
Environmental Filth Multiplier: 1.0x
Unlocks High-tier luxury bounties from Nobles

town.title: Town Street
town.desc: A grey zone crawling with dragons and snakes, where all factions converge.
town.quote_default: 'Fresh flesh, or cold steel? As long as you pay the price, the underground caravan is always open.'
town.quote_1: 'Fresh flesh, or cold steel? As long as you pay the price, the underground caravan is always open.'
town.quote_2: 'Heh... heard losses on the frontlines are massive lately? Just got a batch of durable goods here.'
town.quote_3: 'Don't stare at my mask, it invites unnecessary lethal trouble.'
town.quote_4: 'The clinking of coins is the only beautiful melody in this Abyss.'
town.quote_5: 'True deals aren't made on the streets; the market holds what you seek.'
town.event_success_msg: Requirements satisfied, successfully secured massive rewards!
town.event_fail_msg: The qualifications of this member do not meet the strict demands!

market.title: Underground Market
market.quote_sell: "Liquidate idle members into the black market for cash."
market.sell_confirm_msg:
Are you sure you want to sell code {{name}} to the black market?
This will grant you {{price}} funds, but the member will disappear forever.
market.quote_shop: "Specially banned tactical assets and armaments circulate here."
market.buy_success_msg: Successfully brought asset into the treasury.

dispatch.title: Abyss Tavern
dispatch.desc: Accept underground requests and black market assassination contracts
dispatch.empty: [No bounty requests on the board currently]

login.subtitle: The gate to the Abyss has opened, declare your incarnation method.
login.msg_connecting: [System] Establishing nameless connection with the Abyss...
login.msg_empty: [Warning] Please provide complete bloodline sigils (Email and Password).
login.msg_signup_success: [System] Bloodline registered successfully, please verify your email.
login.btn_anon: [Sign Nameless Blood Compact] (Quick Play without Registration)

base.description: The central orchestration hub of the chamber, managing all internal infrastructure and base operations.
base.dirtiness_warning: [System Warning] The chamber environment is filthy! Member sleep restoration efficiency is heavily penalized. Please immediately assign workers to clean.

arena.title: [Bloody Arena]
arena.desc: Brutal entertainment for the high imperial class. Win matches to secure capital and prestige.
arena.no_fighter: No idle members with combat readiness currently available.
arena.err_no_fighter: [Error] Please select a subject to deploy first.
arena.no_npc: No eligible duel opponents available in this sector currently.
arena.select_to_predict: Select a gladiator to simulate prediction metrics

abyss.title: [Tower of Abyss]
abyss.desc: Endless trials. Each echelon crawls with more lethal abyssal anomalies.
abyss.no_fighter: No idle members with infiltration readiness currently available.
abyss.err_no_fighter: [Error] Please select a subject to deploy first.
abyss.select_to_predict: Select an infiltrator to simulate survival metrics
